title: Cheesy Sweet Spanish Ham Toast
description: A quick, gooey brunch toast that balances salty ham and sweet jam with melty Manchego, perfect for a low‑carb, diabetic‑friendly breakfast.

ingredients.name: Spanish jamón serrano, thinly sliced
ingredients.notes: use lean cut for less fat

instructions: Preheat a non‑stick skillet over medium heat.
Lightly toast the bread slices in the skillet for 1–2 min per side until golden.
Spread ½ tablespoon of sugar‑free jam on each slice and let it caramelize slightly.
Lay 1 oz of jamón serrano over the jam, then top with Manchego cheese slices.
Drizzle olive oil over the cheese and sprinkle sea salt, pepper, rosemary, and lemon zest.
Cover the skillet with a lid and cook for 3–4 min until the cheese is fully melted and bubbly.
Remove the toast from the skillet and transfer to a plate.
Garnish with a handful of microgreens or arugula for a fresh crunch.
Serve immediately while the cheese is still warm and gooey.
